title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 16
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear a coach talking to a player.
questions.audio_script: Coach: Are you joining the practice this evening? || Player: Yes, but I'm not sure what to bring. Last week we used badminton rackets. || Coach: That was only because the hall was busy. Today we are outside again. || Player: Should I bring a ball pump then? || Coach: No, the club has enough of those. [1]Bring your football boots for the grass pitch[/1]. || Player: OK. I'll pack them with my water bottle. || Coach: Good. And arrive ten minutes early so we can start on time. || Coach: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: coach
dialogue.text: Are you joining the practice this evening?

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Yes, but I'm not sure what to bring. Last week we used badminton rackets.

dialogue.speaker: coach
dialogue.text: That was only because the hall was busy. Today we are outside again.

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Should I bring a ball pump then?

dialogue.speaker: coach
dialogue.text: No, the club has enough of those. Bring your football boots for the grass pitch.

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: OK. I'll pack them with my water bottle.

dialogue.speaker: coach
dialogue.text: Good. And arrive ten minutes early so we can start on time.

dialogue.speaker: coach
dialogue.text: That should make things easier.

questions.question: What should the player bring?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, badminton rackets, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, ball pump, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, football boots, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The coach says the player should bring football boots.

questions.context: You hear two colleagues talking at work.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Why did the meeting start late this morning? || Man: I thought it was because the room was too cold, but that wasn't the main problem. || Woman: Was the printer broken again? || Man: No, it was working after someone restarted it. The real reason was that [1]the online guests could not hear us[/1]. || Woman: That explains it. Did anyone miss the first part? || Man: A few people did, so the manager is sending notes to everyone this afternoon. || Man: That should make things easier. || Man: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Why did the meeting start late this morning?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I thought it was because the room was too cold, but that wasn't the main problem.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Was the printer broken again?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No, it was working after someone restarted it. The real reason was that the online guests could not hear us.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That explains it. Did anyone miss the first part?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: A few people did, so the manager is sending notes to everyone this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, cold meeting room with coats, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.context: You hear a parent asking for help at home.
questions.audio_script: Mum: Could you help me before dinner? The house is a mess because your cousins are coming. || Girl: Sure. Do you want me to water the plants? || Mum: I already did that this morning. || Girl: Then I can tidy the living room. || Mum: Your dad is doing that outside. [1]Please fold the clothes from the basket[/1], please. || Girl: OK. I'll start now, but I need five minutes to finish this message first. || Mum: That's fine. Just do it before they arrive. || Mum: That should make things easier. || Mum: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

dialogue.text: Could you help me before dinner? The house is a mess because your cousins are coming.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Sure. Do you want me to water the plants?

dialogue.speaker: mum
dialogue.text: I already did that this morning.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Then I can tidy the living room.

dialogue.speaker: mum
dialogue.text: Your dad is doing that outside. Please fold the clothes from the basket, please.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: OK. I'll start now, but I need five minutes to finish this message first.

dialogue.speaker: mum
dialogue.text: That's fine. Just do it before they arrive.

dialogue.speaker: mum
dialogue.text: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: mum
dialogue.text: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a teacher talking to a student.
questions.audio_script: Teacher: How is your geography project going? || Student: Quite well. I found the information online and wrote the introduction last night. || Teacher: Have you added information about rivers? || Student: Not yet, but Sam is doing that part. I thought I had to make a poster too. || Teacher: No, not for this project. [1]You only need to print the chart for the final page[/1]. || Student: Great. I can do that after school. || Teacher: Remember to check the spelling before you send it to me tomorrow morning. || Teacher: That should make things easier. || Teacher: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

dialogue.text: Great. I can do that after school.

dialogue.text: Remember to check the spelling before you send it to me tomorrow morning.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a birthday present.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Have you bought Grandad's birthday present yet? || Boy: Not yet. I was going to get a scarf, but Mum has knitted one for him. || Girl: What about a box of chocolates? Grandad likes those. || Boy: True, but I bought something similar last year. I saw a nice warm reading lamp in town, and [1]I'll get the warm reading lamp for his chair[/1]. || Girl: That sounds perfect. Do you want me to come with you? || Boy: Yes, please. I always choose better presents with help. || Boy: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: boy

questions.context: You hear a visitor asking for directions inside a building.
questions.audio_script: Receptionist: Are you here for the first aid course? || Visitor: Yes, but I don't know where to go. The email said it was in the gym. || Receptionist: It was, but we had to move it because the projector stopped working. || Visitor: Is it in the café area now? || Receptionist: No, that room is being cleaned. [1]The first aid course is in the small office upstairs[/1]. || Visitor: Thanks. Do I need to sign in first? || Receptionist: Yes, just write your name here, then follow the corridor to the end.

questions.context: You hear two people preparing for an event.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Are you ready for the class picnic on Sunday? || Boy: Nearly. I was going to bring plates, but the teacher already bought some. || Girl: We might need a football too. || Boy: Emma is bringing that, so don't worry. The organiser asked me this morning, and [1]I promised to bring the picnic blanket[/1]. || Girl: Good. Is there space in your bag? || Boy: Yes, if I take out my big coat. The forecast says it will be warm. || Boy: That should make things easier. || Boy: I did not want to decide at the last minute.
